A '''field security overloader''' was a device used by the [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]] to override security systems. It contained an ultrasonic emitter.

==Sources==
*<!-- 2002-04-23 -->''[[Star Wars: Attack of the Clones: The Visual Dictionary]]'' {{1stm}}
